Men over 40 and women over 50 should also consult doctor or health care provider before starting a vigorous physical activity program. 60 Guideline 10 Sources of sodium Restrict salt intake to minimum Rationale: /c183
/c183Sodium plays an important role in nerve conduction and fluid balance in the body. /c183Maintenance of sodium balance depends on kidney function. /c183High intake of salt (sodium chloride) is associated with high blood pressure and stomach cancer. /c183All foods contain sodium. Sodium requirements can be met with moderate salt intake. /c183Sodium intake needs to be balanced by potassium intake. Salt is an essential ingredient
